sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval sheet for BLUE_BUTTON_PLATE part MKK-000104 used on G1417 and G1717 series models.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports customer/supplier part approval, material listing, QC process control, and product inspection criteria for BLUE_BUTTON_PLATE.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_BUTTON_PLATE and part number is MKK-000104.
Applicable models are G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
Material list identifies SK5 as the raw material for the product exterior.
QC process chart includes incoming inspection, CNC machining, washing, buffing, final inspection, and packaging controls.
Product inspection criteria cover appearance, dimensions, and other mutually agreed inspection methods.

The approval revision history states Rev. 0 was initially established on 4/17/25.

evidence.claim: Incoming inspection checks appearance for no cracks, bubbles, foreign matter, or corrosion.
evidence.evidenceText: 수입검사; 외관; 크랙, 기포, 이물질, 부식 없을 것

evidence.claim: CNC machining controls CTQ dimensions 1 and 2.
Final inspection includes appearance and CTQ dimension checks.
Product inspection criteria define one product as one inspection unit.
Product inspection criteria include appearance inspection, dimension inspection, and other mutually agreed criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: 검사항목 외관; 치수; 기타; 일반적인 검사 방법은 상호 협의하에 기준을 정립

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; document appears to be a supplier/customer part approval sheet rather than an RA regulatory document.
Revision appears as Rev. 00 on the cover and as Rev. 0 or Rev.0 in revision/QC sections.
Dates differ by section: approval sheet and QC 작성일자 show 2025.04.17, while one QC process chart section shows 제정일 2025.04.14.
No external standards are explicitly named; Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, and PBDE appear only as substances in a non-use certificate column.
